title: NZ Digital Service Design Standard
description: New Zealand government standard establishing 12 core principles for designing user-focused, inclusive, and secure digital services. Covers the full service lifecycle from user understanding through transparent accountability, with emphasis on security, privacy, collaboration, and data stewardship.

source.page_title: Digital Service Design Standard | NZ Digital government

change_log.summary: Initial ingestion from NZ Digital government standards and guidance portal. Establishes 12 core principles for user-focused, inclusive, and secure digital service design across government.
